description_long: This shotgun features a sleek, futuristic design with a long, slender barrel and a metallic finish that reflects light with a glossy sheen. The receiver and trigger area are intricately detailed, with visible mechanical components and a prominent, rounded trigger guard. The grip is ergonomically curved, appearing to be made from a dark, polished material, and is integrated smoothly into the body of the weapon. The barrel is single and elongated, with a slight taper and no visible ribbing or venting along its length. The overall construction suggests a blend of metal and synthetic materials, giving it a modern, high-tech appearance. The shotgun's silhouette is streamlined, with minimal protrusions and a focus on clean, continuous lines.
description: A sleek, metallic shotgun with a long, single barrel and a glossy, futuristic finish. It features an ergonomic grip and detailed mechanical components.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, highlighting the long barrel, ergonomic grip, and detailed receiver.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the narrow muzzle and the symmetrical alignment of the barrel and grip.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the first side, with clear visibility of the barrel and grip contours.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the back of the grip and the alignment of the stock, with the barrel receding into the distance.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, long and slender with no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded and elongated trigger guard with a smooth, continuous contour
